key.name: confirm-before-run
key.summary: Ask for confirmation before executing commands

key.name: grid-columns
key.summary: Number of buttons per row in the grid

key.name: hidden-categories
key.summary: Categories hidden from the category bar and button grid

key.name: button-size
key.summary: Button size in the grid (small, medium, large)

key.name: always-on-top
key.summary: Keep window always on top of other windows

key.name: icon-search-paths
key.summary: Custom icon directories searched before the bundled icon set

key.name: custom-theme-path
key.summary: Path to user-provided CSS theme file (Pro)

key.name: language
key.summary: Interface language code (system, en, fr, de, es, it, ja, zh, ko, ru, ar, hi, pt)

key.name: trial-started-at
key.summary: ISO date when the 14-day Pro trial was seeded (anti-tamper backup)

key.name: mcp-execution-enabled
key.summary: Allow MCP-connected AI clients to trigger button execution

key.name: settings-version
key.summary: Internal schema version — incremented when a migration is applied in do_startup
